_doc: Faithful replay of staging job 412aeed8-a277-4e78-bf8f-57a8c098d4a0 (process SendStatusReport, folder Shared). Real uip CLI evidence captured from .local/investigations/raw, scrubbed (host->MOCK-HOST, account->UIPATH\REPLACEMENT_USER, email->original_email@test.com). Error texts, job/folder keys kept verbatim.

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any unmatched read-only uip query (incl. both trace forms 'or jobs traces' / 'traces spans get') returns []. The fault signature is fully carried by jobs get/logs, so traces are not load-bearing here.
